titleEn: Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered
titleZh: 澳大利亚首批商业化体内性别鉴定雏鸡交付，禽业福利与智慧养殖迈入新阶段
summaryZh: 澳大利亚特种育种公司（SBA）向McLean Farms交付了该国首批商业化体内性别鉴定（in-ovo sexing）雏鸡，标志着澳大利亚成为继德国、法国、巴西和美国之后又一个在商业规模应用该技术的国家。该技术采用非侵入式高光谱光学分析，在孵化前即可判定雏鸡性别，从而避免大规模淘汰雄性雏鸡，显著提升动物福利。消费者调查显示84%的受访者有意购买此类鸡蛋，66%愿意支付溢价。此举不仅为蛋鸡产业提供了更高福利的产品选项，也体现了智慧畜牧中AI、光学传感与自动化技术的深度融合，对全球禽业可持续发展具有重要示范意义。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了高光谱光学分析、AI识别与自动化分拣技术在禽业中的商业化落地，是智慧畜牧中“精准养殖+福利提升+消费端驱动”的典型案例，对关注禽业智能化转型和动物福利创新的从业者具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Company News In-ovo sexing Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered McLean Farms first egg producer to receive the technology 15 June 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Oceania Specialised Breeders Australia (SBA) has delivered the country's first commercial in-ovo sexed day-old chicks to McLean Farms, making it the first egg producer in Australia to receive chicks produced using in-ovo sex determination technology, according to a company press release. The inaugural placement was made in June 2026. In May, SBA announced it had become the first company in the Asia-Pacific region to introduce in-ovo sexing for commercial egg producers, using Agri Advanced Technology's Cheggy technology. Cheggy uses non-invasive, hyperspectral light-based optical analysis to determine the sex of a chick prior to hatching at a commercially viable scale.With the first commercial placement now complete, Australia joins a growing number of countries — including Germany, France, Brazil and the United States — where the technology is being used commercially. In the EU, in-ovo sexing technology has reached 28% market penetration.According to an Australian consumer survey conducted by Ipsos in August 2025 on behalf of Innovate Animal Ag, 84% of 1,000 respondents expressed interest in purchasing in-ovo sexed eggs, and 66% were willing to pay a premium.SBA will produce in-ovo sexed chicks as an additional product offering from June 2026, registered with the "Certified Humane" trademark."The delivery of Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks is a proud moment for SBA and a genuine milestone for our industry," said Eugene Viljoen, chief executive officer of Specialised Breeders Australia. "As Australia's market-leading supplier of commercial layer genetics, we are investing in innovations that support the long-term needs of egg producers: our belief is that Australian producers deserve access to the best technology the world has to offer and should be able to produce new products in response to changing consumer expectations.""The commercial delivery of in-ovo sexed chicks is a positive development for our industry, that will provide greater, high-welfare product options for layers and the end consumer," said Melinda Hashimoto, chief executive officer of Egg Farmers of Australia. "We congratulate SBA and McLean Farms on this milestone." translationZh:
澳大利亚特种育种公司（SBA）已向McLean Farms交付了该国首批商业化体内性别鉴定（in-ovo sexed）一日龄雏鸡，使其成为澳大利亚首家接收采用体内性别鉴定技术生产雏鸡的蛋鸡生产商，据公司新闻稿称。

首批投放于2026年6月完成。今年5月，SBA宣布成为亚太地区首家为商业蛋鸡生产商引入体内性别鉴定技术的公司，该技术采用Agri Advanced Technology公司的Cheggy技术。Cheggy利用非侵入式、基于高光谱光学的光学分析，在孵化前以商业可行的规模判定雏鸡性别。

随着首批商业投放的完成，澳大利亚加入了越来越多已商业应用该技术的国家行列，包括德国、法国、巴西和美国。在欧盟，体内性别鉴定技术的市场渗透率已达到28%。

根据Ipsos于2025年8月代表Innovate Animal Ag进行的一项澳大利亚消费者调查，1000名受访者中有84%表示有兴趣购买体内性别鉴定鸡蛋，66%愿意支付溢价。

SBA将从2026年6月起将体内性别鉴定雏鸡作为附加产品提供，并注册了“Certified Humane”商标。

“澳大利亚首批商业化体内性别鉴定雏鸡的交付对SBA而言是一个自豪的时刻，也是我们行业的一个真正里程碑，”澳大利亚特种育种公司首席执行官Eugene Viljoen表示。“作为澳大利亚商业蛋鸡遗传材料的市场领先供应商，我们正在投资于支持蛋鸡生产商长期需求的创新：我们相信澳大利亚生产商应获得世界最佳技术的支持，并应能够生产出响应不断变化的消费者期望的新产品。”

“体内性别鉴定雏鸡的商业交付对我们行业来说是一个积极的发展，将为蛋鸡和最终消费者提供更多高福利产品选择，”澳大利亚蛋鸡养殖者协会首席执行官Melinda Hashimoto表示。“我们祝贺SBA和McLean Farms达成这一里程碑。”
contentHtml:
Australia's first commercial in-ovo sexed chicks delivered 
McLean Farms first egg producer to receive the technology
